title: Trump, Xi meet in China
shortDescription: President Donald Trump’s two-day Beijing visit began at Tianamen Square with a grand welcome from Chinese President Xi Jinping.

title: Daily Briefing: Trump's China schedule
shortDescription: The president is in Beijing with an entourage of CEOs. Here is the news to know on Thursday.

title: This weatherman thinks local TV stars can end stormy weather in Congress
shortDescription: Local TV stars from Miami to Pennsylvania are running for office. A former weatherman hopes breaking news experience will help fix a stalled Congress.

title: White House is like 'Home Alone' during Trump trip, Vance says
shortDescription: Vice President JD Vance compared himself to Macaulay Culkin's character in the popular film franchise as major administration officials arrived in China.

title: Trump posts meme of Venezuela as new US state
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has again suggested that his administration would try to annex the oil-rich country of Venezuela.

title: Congressman accuses Rand Paul's son of drunken, antisemitic bar tirade
shortDescription: Sen. Rand Paul's son, William Paul, hurled antisemitic slurs at Rep. Mike Lawler in front of a reporter at a Capitol Hill bar, according to lawmaker.

title: Democrats look to rising stars to flip US Senate seat in Iowa
shortDescription: State Rep. Josh Turek and state Sen. Zach Wahls are emphasizing their ability to take on U.S. Rep. Ashley Hinson in Iowa's U.S. Senate race.

title: Coming soon: Big Supreme Court decisions on Trump, elections, citizenship
shortDescription: The Supreme Court is in its final stretch for the year in deciding major cases. Big rulings loom related to Trump's power, elections and other controversies.

title: Trump's hotel plan for presidential library land sparks lawsuit
shortDescription: President Donald Trump and Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis are allegedly violating the Constitution through a gift of high-value Miami real estate.

title: Trump 'of course' cares about Americans' finances, Vance says
shortDescription: VP Vance tried to clean up comments by Donald Trump in which the president said he isn't considering Americans' finances as he negotiates with Iran.

title: Vance defends Trump on Americans finances
shortDescription: Vance pushes back on claims about Trump and says Americans finances matter as the administration weighs Iran and nuclear diplomacy.

title: Trump doubles down on Venezuela being the '51st State' in post
shortDescription: Only days after suggesting that Venezuela could become the 51st state, President Donald Trump doubled down, posting a map of the oil-rich country.

title: Trump is in China, and other May 13 news from the Trump Connect reporter
shortDescription: President Donald Trump landed in China on May 13, where he will be for the next two days for a summit and meetings with Xi Jinping.

title: Senate confirms Trump pick as next Fed chair
shortDescription: The Senate confirmed former finance executive and former Federal Reserve Governor Kevin Warsh as the U.S. central bank’s new chair.

title: Advocates condemn Trump administration's Wall Street Journal subpoenas
shortDescription: The newspaper called the Trump administration's actions "an attack on constitutionally protected newsgathering" and vowed to "vigorously oppose" it.

title: Bill would ban 'vulture investors' from youth sports
shortDescription: The bill, which would require private equity companies to divest from their youth-sports businesses, comes on the heels of a USA TODAY investigation.

title: Trump defends billionaire in tax feud with NYC Mayor Mamdani
shortDescription: Griffin said that Mamdani turned him into a "political puppet."

title: Trump takes carrot-and-stick approach to U.S.-Cuba negotiations
shortDescription: Castillo, Otero and a dozen other political prisoners are central to high‑stakes US-Cuba talks that could reshape relations between Cold War foes.

title: New Pittsburgh law bans ICE from operating on some city property
shortDescription: Pittsburgh has banned Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents from operating on some city property.

title: Trump arrives in China. These 12 powerful CEOs are joining him
shortDescription: Trump lands in China with top CEOs for tense talks with Xi as U.S.–China ties remain strained
